vpx_info.5-way_combo: Shooting any ramp starts the combo lights flashing. shoot any arrow to continue the combo sequence. combos are worth 10M+10M for each successive shot.
vpx_info.attack_mars: The 6th wave is an attack on Mars. First you lower the forcefield as normal. This time the drop target stays down and you have to hit the sinkhole 10 times. Each shot takes a chunk out of Mars on the display. On the 10th hit Mars explodes and you are awarded 2.5B. After conquering Mars, each shot to the center drop target scores 100M for the rest of the game.
vpx_info.attack_waves: Opening the forcefield starts one of 5 Attack Waves. The object is to protect one of 5 countries from alien attack by hitting the drop target repeatedly. The countries are: France; Germany; Italy; England; USA. The display shows a saucer damaging one of that countries National Treasures, e.g. stealing the Statue of Liberty. The display also shows a damage meter which decreases each time you hit the drop target. Hitting the targets beside the drop target multiplies the damage caused and the points awarded. The drop target is worth 50M per hit 1st wave, 60M 2nd wave and so on. When the damage meter is empty the drop target stays down and a shot to the center sinkhole destroys the saucer. This is worth 200M 1st wave, 300M 2nd wave and so on. Completing the 2nd wave lights Extra Ball. Each wave has an assortment of quotes in that countries accent.
vpx_info.author: g5k [not set] [not set]
vpx_info.martian_multiball: Lighting all 7 Martian targets lights Martian Attack at the right sinkhole. You have 30 seconds to hit each bank of Martian targets to start Martian multiball. This is a 2 ball Multiball in which the object is to hit as many Martians as possible. Each Martian is worth 250K which is added on during the bonus count. Martian Attack Champion is displayed in attract mode.
vpx_info.multiball: Shooting the center ramp lights locks. Lock 3 for multiball. All ramps and orbits are lit for jackpot starting at 60M and increasing by 10M for each hit. After hitting all 5 jackpots a traveling super jackpot is lit worth 250M. After super jackpot, all jackpots are re-lit. After each super jackpot the value increases by 250M to a maximum of 1B. This value is held for the entire game.
vpx_info.rules: Skill Shot : There are 2 skill shots. The basic skill shot launches the ball to above the bumpers. You have to collect the flashing lane like on Corvette or Flintstones. This is worth 10M + 10M for each successful shot. This also increases the bonus X by 5X.
vpx_info.strobe_multiball: A 3 ball multiball. All playfield lights are off except the strobe lights and the forcefield. The aim is to hit the forcefield as many times as possible. 10 hits lights extra ball and 20 hits awards 250M.
vpx_info.stroke_of_luck: A random award collected at the right sinkhole. The awards are: Start Attack Wave, Light Extra Ball, Video Mode, Light/Award Lock, Strobe Multiball, Multiball, Hold Bonus, 25M or 50M. Stroke of Luck is re-lit by lighting all 4 inlanes and outlanes.
vpx_info.super_jets: Each bumper hit counts down from 100. Reaching 0 starts super jets for 3M per hit. A subsequent super jets will require an extra 25 bumper hits.
vpx_info.super_skill_shot: Holding in the left flipper when launching the ball enables super skill shot. The ball continues around the orbit and the object is to hit a ramp, orbit or the gate for 50M. This also completes the feature on a ramp or orbit and starts an attack wave if you hit the forcefield.
vpx_info.total_annihilation: Shooting any ramp or orbit spots one of the features below it. The first shot is worth 20M, the 2nd is worth 25M and the 3rd shot lights hurry-up at the gate for 100M. completing all ramps and orbits starts Total annihilation 4 ball multiball. All jackpots are lit starting at 50M and increasing by 5M for each shot. The center ramp is the Annihilation Jackpot and is worth 100M + 15M for each other jackpot made like Cryoprison on Demo Man.
vpx_info.video_mode: You control a cannon and have to shoot at decending saucers. The flippers control the direction of your shots. If a saucer reaches the ground the mode ends. If you shoot enough saucers, you have to take on an alien mothership. 80 hits will destroy the mothership. Pressing the launch button activates a smart bomb which destroys every saucer in the display. Only 1 smart bomb can be used.

vpx_info.any_major_shot_will_light_whatever_shots: Left inlane lights right ramp, right loop, AcMag ramp ... Right inlane lights Left orbit, Left ramp ... Right orbit (or AcMag/left roll) lights Computer and Side Ramp, etc.
vpx_info.author: Knorr/Kiwi [not set] [not set]
vpx_info.bonus_count_consists_of_10mil_for_each_c: you can repeat claw modes and each claw visit, NOT each lit claw award, scores 10M in bonus. There is a special trigger award ... see the spoilers for more details.
vpx_info.car_crash: Located to the left of the retina scan is the Car Crash target. Triggering the switch causes two miniature cars to crash. This is supposedly a "new feature." The ball will rocket off this target, but there's a ballsaver if it goes STDM.
vpx_info.center_ramp_(the_acmag): Located at the very top of the playfield, it is a wide ramp (three pinball widths wide) that is triggered only by a gate. Balls drop immediately and roll either down the left loop or into the MTL rollovers. The center ramp has a Jackpot lamp and a Combo arrow. The Center Ramp is bounded on the left by the Upper Rebound and on the right by the left jet bumper.
vpx_info.cryo-claw: This is the game's big gimmick. An "elevator" carries balls from the right ramp up to a magnetic claw which the player controls with the two gun triggers. The claw can be positioned and the ball dropped into one of 5 lanes, each starting a different "mode" (I use that term loosely). Depending on the mode chosen, the ball will return to a different position.
vpx_info.flippers: There are two standard-length flippers at the bottom, and one upper left flipper at the bottom of the left loop. There isn't much space between the two bottom flippers, thankfully.
vpx_info.jet_bumpers: There are two regular jet bumpers and a top slingshot which scores the same as a jet bumper. They advance the Retina Scan value. The left jet bumper can also be hit from the center ramp -- it acts as the right wall of the center ramp.
vpx_info.left_inlane: When lit, this inlane lights the Access Claw on the right ramp.
vpx_info.left_loop: This loop is just to the right of the upper flipper. It feeds to a sinkhole when hit hard enough; otherwise, the ball passes behind the top ramp into the MTL rollovers. This shot can be lit to start multiball and award extra balls, otherwise it awards a mystery bonus.
vpx_info.left_ramp: Directly to the right of the left loop is this ramp which always feeds to the left inlane. It can be lit for "Quick Freeze" and the "Car Chase" round.
vpx_info.mtl_rollovers: In the top right corner are three rollovers which advance the bonus multiplier. Balls leave the rollovers into the jet bumpers. These are very hard to see from the player's point of view. Especially the leftmost (M) rollover.
vpx_info.outlanes: There are posts on the inlane/outlane dividers, but they are very dangerous due to the crazy spins the ball tends to have. DM is shipped without rubber on these posts. There are no "Specials" or other awards in the outlanes.
vpx_info.retina_scan: This is the leftmost shot of the game. The ball passes through a gate and into an eject that feeds the left inlane. If hit hard enough through the gate, it will hit the captive eyeball.
vpx_info.right_inlane: When lit, this inlane lights the left ramp for a "Quick Freeze."
vpx_info.right_loop: This shot feeds the ball past the MTL rollovers and all the way around to the upper left flipper. If it doesn't make it (ie: weak shot) the ball will fall into the MTL rollovers.
vpx_info.right_ramp: This is a tall ramp similar to the right ramp in Judge Dredd. It has a diverter which normally sends the ball to the right inlane, but it can send the ball to the Cryo-Claw when that feature is available. It's also used during the Car Chase round, and to score Super Jackpots. Lights are, from bottom up, Claw Ready, Car Chase, Explode, Jackpot, Combo Arrow. There is a Super Jackpot light mounted over the ramp.
vpx_info.right_rebound: This is a three inch piece of rubber on the right side of the playfield, just above the right outlane. Just like the Upper Rebound, it is rubber stretched across a switch.
vpx_info.side_ramp: This is a small, twisting, and difficult ramp just below the Computer. It is used for the skill shot. The Side Ramp has a jackpot lamp and a Combo Arrow.
vpx_info.slingshots: The left slingshot is standard, but with a slight angle at the top to make the left inlane larger at the top. The right slingshot is shaped like ST:TNG slings at the top, but much narrower. It's more like a standard slingshot with a flattened top.
vpx_info.standups: There are 5 yellow standup targets scattered about the playfield, like those in TZ. However, these targets are very important to game play. One is located directly below the upper left flipper; another is to the right of the left ramp; two more are angled to the left of the right ramp; and one is to the right of the right ramp.
vpx_info.top_sinkhole: This shot awards a mystery bonus when nothing is lit; it awards multiball and extra balls when lit. This shot is most easily made from a left loop shot; occasionally, however, a ball will bounce in there from a lucky center ramp shot.
vpx_info.underground: This is a sinkhole to the left of the jets and to the right of the center ramp, with the opening on the left side. It is an easy shot from the upper left flipper, and it can also be made with a little luck from either of the lower flippers. The Computer and Demolition Time are awarded here. The Underground has a Jackpot lamp and a Combo arrow. The ball is returned, via a VUK to the right ramp habitrail. The Computer and Demolition time are indicated by yellow and blue lights mounted over the Underground entrance.
vpx_info.upper_rebound: This is a three inch piece of rubber forming the left wall of the Center Ramp that is stretched across a switch ... hitting the rubber activates the switch, just like the left and right 110 switches on Whirlwind.

title: Demolition Man (LX-4C Competition + LED Ghost MOD)

vpx_info.the_award_choices_will_not_be_random,_bu: double feel lucky points, advance magazine, advance rank, bonus multiplier, super ricochet, hold bonus.
vpx_info.the_ball_is_loaded_into_the_gun,_and_the: Always go for this. Not only does it give you points, starting at 5M incrementing by 5M every successful time, but it also lights a mode].

title: Dr. Dude (LA-2)

vpx_info.added_1_tilt_warning: This is NOT an April Fool's joke!
vpx_info.another_multiball_tip: If you catch one ball on the left flipper, keep it there! Then keep looping the Ramp with the other ball. When I get one ball in the Mix Master, I always try to catch the other ball right away.
vpx_info.author: wrd1972 and VPW [not set] [not set]
vpx_info.bonus_x_at_max: The end-of-ball bonus multiplier is raised to 6x. A side effect is that the next time you complete the Drop Targets, Million will be lit.
vpx_info.extra_ball_is_lit: Shoot the Left Saucer for an extra ball.
vpx_info.multiball_is_pretty_simple: shoot the Mix Master as much as possible. The display shows a counter, which is the number of Mix Master target hits you need to collect the jackpot. During Multiball, all 9 targets work the same; a hit to any target decreases the counter by 1.
vpx_info.scoring_is_controlled_by_9_standup_targe: red for the Heart of Rock 'n Roll, yellow for the Gift of Gab, and green for Magnetic Personality. These targets spot shots to the Elements, light Lock, and build towards the Jackpot during Multiball.
vpx_info.slingshots_score_100,000: This can be worth a bundle if you don't mind giving up control of the ball to the slingshots.
vpx_info.special_is_lit: Shoot the Left Saucer for a special.

vpx_info.light-up_targets: Shoot Light-up Targets when flashing. Complete Light-up  Bank waves for Jackpots.
vpx_info.object: To win the most challenging race in the world, the Indianapolis 500  and take a victory lap.
vpx_info.pit_stop_multi-ball: Complete the P-I-T lanes at the top of the playfield to  light 'PIT STOP'. Shoot right ramp when PIT STOP is lit to start pit stop.
vpx_info.skill_shot: After Ball Launch shoot left ramp to collect Skill Shot Award.
vpx_info.souvenir: Collect the Indy Souvenirs and discover the secrets that each unlocks.  Collect all souvenirs for Jackpot.
vpx_info.speedway_award: Outer left loop shot lights Speedway Award. Outer right loop shot awards lit speedway item.
vpx_info.turbo_multi-ball: Outer left loop shot lights Turbo lock. Lock two balls  for TURBO Multi-Ball. Shoot for Jackpots on ramps, or relock all three balls  in the turbo for Super Jackpot!
vpx_info.victory_lap: Complete any race status section to light Victory Lap!

vpx_info.blurb: Laser Cue is a four flipper game in 1984, and features an unusual billiards in space theme.
vpx_info.description: Laser Cue is equipped with a bell that rings when billiard balls are collected or extra balls achieved. The main bank of drop targets are individually controlled, and must be collected in the indicated order to remain dropped. Extra ball play guarantees the player twenty-five seconds of play time, serving all lost balls within that time back to the shooter lane.
vpx_info.rules: Top rollovers build bonus multiplier that is held between balls. Bonus multiplier can get up to 20x! The right flipper button rotates the lit lanes

vpx_info.small_wheel: Shooting the ball up the left lane ANYtime except during multiball and when the jackpot is lit spins the small wheel. Your awards are:
vpx_info.the_left_lane_serves_3_purposes: Spin the small wheel, collect jackpot, and "power charge" during multiball.
vpx_info.the_loops_work_like_this: When no value on the loop is lit, you get the lowest one on there, and it starts flashing. The flashing score is the LAST score you got for that loop. Actually, more specifically, it indicates the next score you'll get by shooting the loop, which would be the next-highest non-flashing one.
vpx_info.wimp_extra_ball: Lit when the game feels terribly sorry for you. If you've had a really bad game (no Shuttle Ramp shots, few (if any) loops, and a low score) then the extra ball will be lit for you. There's no warning, it just is. There are lots of games that do this; BoP is by no means unique in this regard. (What are some others? T2, HS2, Diner, Dr. Dude, Police Force, etc.)

vpx_info.author: VPW [not set] [not set]

vpx_info.arrow: Moves you forward or backward 1-5 spaces.
vpx_info.assault: For each time all three paths got into the Vault, you are awarded a VAULT letter, and $750k.
vpx_info.atm_card: Gives you an ATM Card, used in the Board Game.
vpx_info.atm_visits: For each ATM Visit you get $10k.
vpx_info.author: fuzzel, flupper1, rothbauerw, UnclePaulie [not set] http://www.vpforums.org/
vpx_info.bank_entrance: Will open an Bank Entrance for you.
vpx_info.blender: Sorry, doesn't help you at all.
vpx_info.blurb: Bally's Safe Cracker combines pinball and board games
vpx_info.bonus_x: For each break-in into the bank, you increase your bonus multiplier.
vpx_info.break-ins: Shoot for the FLASHING DROP TARGETS. When all targets are made one of the BANK ENTRANCES will light for a BREAK-IN. Add possible entrances by shooting for the LOWER LEFT DROP TARGETS.
vpx_info.break_into_the_vault: As you play, three paths are taken from each entrance into the Vault. To Move these paths, hit the drop targets. Red targets move the ROOF Path. Orange targets move the CELLAR Path, and White targets move the MAIN Path. The Yellow Targets and the Cellar Target move ALL THREE paths.
vpx_info.call_guard: Will Call the Guard. You will either be awarded $100k or he'll open a gate for you, immediately starting the board game.
vpx_info.cop_arrow: Moves the cop forward or backward 1-5 spaces.
vpx_info.deposit_window: Same as if you hit the left inlane. Gives you a visit to the Teller Lady.
vpx_info.description: The goal is to advance to the board game for a chance to break into the safe while avoiding obstacles along the way. Players spin and stop the safe dial to determine how many spaces to advance. The player can collect winnings and resume playing pinball after each dial spin, or spin again and risk losing it all. Players must risk it all for a chance to break into the bank vault and win the token award.
vpx_info.disable_computer: Will disable computer for 20 seconds. If in Timed mode, your timer is suspended, and hitting targets will add to the time you have. Also, 'Explosives' mode timer is halted during this. If in Sudden Death, you can drain and get your ball back. Once you drain, your timer is restarted.
vpx_info.donuts: Donuts on hand are worth $5k each.
vpx_info.explosives: Starts a timed mode, similar to 'Frenzy' in Funhouse. Every switch is $5k.
vpx_info.four_gates_surround_the_vault._landing_o: Two unlocked, one locked. A randomly moving box is stopped by a flipper button. If the player stops on an unlocked gate, the board game continues. If stopped on a locked gate, the player must have a Skeleton Key to continue, or wind up getting kicked out of the board game.
vpx_info.free_token: Will award the player a Token.
vpx_info.hint: Replay Magic Tokens for surprising results!
vpx_info.in_pinball_mode,_you_can_set_up_your_pat: Main, Roof, and Cellar. Your goal: The Vault. Once in the bank, you can only go forward, or clockwise around the loop. You select the number of spaces to move by stopping the spinning dial on the screen, and then taking whatever reward (or punishment) you land on.
vpx_info.in_the_bank: Check your position on the board game in the backglass. Spin the wheel in the display to move inside the bank. Avoid the FLASHING GUARDS.
vpx_info.jackpots: For each Jackpot collected, you are awarded $50k.
vpx_info.light_lock: If LOCK isn't lit, LOCK is then lit. If LOCK is lit, then it awards a LOCK for you. If two balls are locked, then it opens the Main Entrance for you, immediately starting the board game.
vpx_info.lightening_bolt: Sends a lightening bolt around the loop. The first person (you or the cop) it lands on is destroyed. You get kicked out of the board game, the cop has to start over.
vpx_info.lite_wheel: Lights the disc for the Wheel Award.
vpx_info.money_bomb: Only awarded in board game. See Board Game for details.
vpx_info.multi-balltm: When you collect the LITE LOCKS value from the wheel, shoot for the ramp. After 2 Locks are made shoot the ball into the Main Entrance to begin multi-ball.
vpx_info.normal-as-usual_lanes._inlane_is_labeled: 'Light Deposit Window' and outlane is 'Extra Time'. Unless you have an uncollected award waiting from the Wheel, this will light the Bank for a visit to the teller. Extra time will give you 20 seconds.
vpx_info.note_to_teller: Note for the Teller, taken in the Board Game.
vpx_info.object: Work against TIME to Break into the BANK. Make your way around the BOARD GAME to get to the VAULT. Break into the vault for MAGIC TOKENS!
vpx_info.of_course,_up_to_four_players_can_play,_: Normal and Assault. Players rotate after each drain (unless a player is in Assault) until they are out of time. Players who's game is over have their score appear dimmed on the display. If a player's game is over, then the players who still have time rotate, skipping the player who's done. A player playing Assault On The Vault finishes his multiball in one turn, then his bonus is counted up, and his game is over. The other players continue their normal games.
vpx_info.paths: For each path space achieved, you are awarded $5k.
vpx_info.same_as_getting_the_'lite_deposit_window: about 50% of the time she will award you a 'Money Bomb'. Getting a Money Bomb kicks you out of the board game, forcing you to relight LOCK. A way around this is to get the 'Note To Teller' award from the Cellar Award.
vpx_info.starts_the_guard_dog,_pinball_mode._you_: Carry a dog biscuit or if you've already defeated the dog. Either case awards $25k to your stash, and you get to continue. While in Pinball mode, if you shoot the Ramp, you start TNT Multiball. If you drain, you go on to the next ball. (Or Game Over if in Sudden Death) Either way, you need to relight LOCK to get back into the bank and lose your stash. If you are in Timed Play, then your timer *IS* counting down as well.
vpx_info.sudden_death: When the TIMER goes to ZERO you are in SUDDEN DEATH. When that ball is lost the game is over.
vpx_info.the_board_game_has_many_different_types_: White spots are 'normal' spots, Yellow spots are Gates, and Red spots kick you out of the board.
vpx_info.the_fun_part_of_the_game._dropping_in_a_: 9, Magic Credits: 3' means you have 9 total credits, the first three are Magic Credits.)
vpx_info.the_wheel: Lite the wheel by going thru the right upper mini-flipper lane or by shooting the ramp. Hit the wheel to move the value in the center of the timer. Collect value in the bank entrance.
vpx_info.there_are_two_'modes'_in_the_pinball: Timed and Sudden Death. When in Timed Play, you have time on the clock and any drain will be immediately served back to you. If in multi-player mode, the next player is up. Also in this mode, hitting switches add a *bit* of time to your timer. Most times it's not noticeable, but a good spin on the wheel can give you a good :05 or :10. After each Board Game, the timer counts down faster, and it's harder to stay out of Sudden Death. Sudden Death is just that: Drain, and your game's over. There is no way to get out of Sudden Death just by hitting switches. You must regain time by getting TNT Multiball, a Teller Gift, or an outlane.
vpx_info.this_is_the_main_entrance._similar_to_'t: If you have an uncollected Wheel Award, you will be awarded that. Otherwise, the left inlane was hit, and a visit to the teller lady will be awarded. If the red light is lit, then the Entrance is open to start (or continue) the Board Game.
vpx_info.tnt: Ends Board Game, starts TNT Multiball.
vpx_info.vault_jackpot: The Vault Jackpot starts at $50k, and for each hit on the Spinning Disc, raises by $10k. Shoot up the ramp to collect the Jackpot. Once your time is up, you start Fun-With-Bonus:
vpx_info.winged_shoes: YOU go flying around the loop. When you hit the flipper button, you slowly decrease speed and land on a spot.

vpx_info.-_battle_simulation: Shoot the Probe guns into Mission Start & Neutral Zone.
vpx_info.-_q's_challenge: Easily the most lucrative mode.  First lit shot worth 1OM,
vpx_info.-_rescue: Close 45 switches to load the shuttles, then shoot Alpha or Beta ramp
vpx_info.-_search_galaxy: Shoot Alpha, Beta, Delta ramps.  Any order collects one
vpx_info.-_time_rift: Time Rift targets add time to the clock and 5M to the payout on
vpx_info.-_warp_4: Lite Spinner		Well worth the trouble to get, 1OOK/spin plus.

vpx_info.-_warp_7: Double Spinner	Be sure to boost Spinner via Time Rift first.
vpx_info.-_warp_9: Warp 9 Mode		Shots to Warp Factor 2OM, 25M... 6OM max.
vpx_info.-_worm_hole: Shoot left ramp for 3OM or more, plus an Artifact.  E-Z!
vpx_info.1oo_million: Holodeck will cover it; or a well-played Mission.
vpx_info.2o_million: Shoot right ramp repeatedly or Mission Start once.
vpx_info.2oo_million: Usually, multiball will get you this level of scoring.
vpx_info.5o_million: Next mission, or a few trips on the Spinner.
vpx_info.5oo_million: Start Q's Challenge, or go for Warp 9 mode.

vpx_info.or_more: Go for the Final Frontier.  It's not impossible to reach.
vpx_info.right_ramp_looping: An unusual strategy which may work; shoot the Right Ramp.

vpx_info.author: rothbauerw, dark [not set] http://www.vpinball.com/
vpx_info.blurb: Golf themed pinball table that captures the spirit of golfers and the flow of the game of golf.
vpx_info.captive_ball: A ball trapped in the top right corner. Hitting the ball causes it to bounce around in it’s little area hitting a bumper and some switches. Each hit adds to the end of ball bonus.
vpx_info.center_lane: A lane leading to a vertical up kicker. The shot can be made through a gap between the coconut targets but it’s a fairly precise shot. Shooting the lane with all targets up awards a hole in one. If any targets are down shooting the lane spins the Gopher wheel.
vpx_info.coconut_targets: Four drop targets in front of a lane in the center of the playfield. Hitting them adds 1M to the end of ball bonus.
vpx_info.description: This golf themed table carries the spirit of "Caddyshack."  Gunther the gopher will pester and annoy you throughout the game.
vpx_info.extra_ball: Extra ball is lit at the slice target for 15 seconds.
vpx_info.find_the_gopher: 15 seconds to shoot any hole. If you are lucky you find the gopher for 30M, otherwise you get insulted.
vpx_info.flippers: Two normal Gottlieb "Catch All" flippers in the usual place.
vpx_info.gopher_wheel: A roulette wheel sunk into the lower playfield. The wheel has 12 holes representing the letters in the word Gopher. Lighting all letters starts Go-Fore-Par-Tee.
vpx_info.hook_shot: A single stand up target which awards the hook shot value when lit. Can also be lit for a jackpot.
vpx_info.hurry_up_20_million: A small standup target which awards 20M when lit.
vpx_info.inlanes/outlanes: The usual. The outlanes are always lit for Hole In One. The left inlane lights dogleg and the Right inlane lights Cheat Shot.
vpx_info.mean_hole: A saucer in an enclosed area to the right of the volcano. Awards Mystery when lit.
vpx_info.pitch_and_putt: Each shot to the mean hole scores 10M. The post in the lane leading to the top flipper traps the ball to allow a clean shot at the hole. The mode ends in 15 seconds.
vpx_info.right_orbit: Feeds around to the mean hole. Awards a dogleg , mystery or hole in one when lit.
vpx_info.right_ramp: A ramp leading around the back of the captive ball and feeding to the top flipper. Spots holes 2, 4 and 8 and relights the mode start at the volcano. Can be lit for jackpot.
vpx_info.saucer: A typical Gottlieb saucer. Spots holes 3, 5 and 7 and can award a jackpot.
vpx_info.skins_game: Shoot the volcano to add a letter to skins. Spelling skins give the choice of taking 10M points and being called a chicken by the machine, or playing for double or nothing. The game chooses a shot at random and you need to hit that shot within 20 seconds to double your score. If you miss you lose your score and start again from zero. For the rest of that ball recover score is lit at the dogleg. Shooting recover score restores your points to their former glory.
vpx_info.slice_target: A single stand up target. Each hit adds a letter to Slice. Spelling slice lights a hurry up 50M. Can also be lit for an extra ball.
vpx_info.special_lane: A lane running behind the targets fed directly from the top flippers. Awards a special when lit.
vpx_info.targets: Three targets whose name escapes me at the moment. No known use unless lit during Skins Game.
vpx_info.tee\u2019d_off: Shoot the center lane for an increasing point value starting at 5M.
vpx_info.top_flipper: A small flipper angled to shoot the volcano, hurry up target or a ramp leading to the mean hole. Balls can be caught by a small post if required.
vpx_info.volcano: A vertical up kicker with a plastic volcano above it. Spots Holes 1, 6 and 9, starts modes when lit and can award a jackpot or a cheat shot when lit.

vpx_info.author: UnclePaulie [not set] [not set]
vpx_info.blurb: Tri Zone... Welcome to the next dimension in futuristic fantasy!
vpx_info.description: Tri Zone integrated futuristic sounds, scoring, and visual effects for the time.
vpx_info.drop_targets: Making Z-O-N-E lites spinner or top eject hole to score 10,000... Or drop the targets for 10,000 each... outlanes for special.
vpx_info.mega_points: Making A&B increases the bonus value 2x, 3x, 4x, and 5x for up to 95,000 points.
vpx_info.shoot_for_t-r-i: Earn lit values from 3,000 to 10,000 points, or special, or extra ball.
vpx_info.you_can_backhand_some_of_the_targets,_to: the first set lights the left spinner; the second set changes the top saucer value from 5000 to 10000; the third set makes all four Zone letters worth 10000 each for the rest of the ball [the lights come on for all of them at once, steady rather than flashing]; the fourth set lights the outlanes for a special [irrelevant], but at that point, the 10K per target alone makes them your primary goal.

title: Tri Zone (T-1 Ted Estes, Free Play Fix)

vpx_info.author: MechaEnron [not set] [not set]
vpx_info.description: TRUCK STOP captures America at its most manic, and spins it on eighteen big rubber wheels... The player (truck driver) is pitted against the Interstate System and other gearjammers. The truck route winds between five proud cities of the sun belt and rust belt: LA, Denver, Dallas, Chicago, and New York. Each has its own spirit and its own adventure. The player must show his true grit over long stretches of open road. A long rank of gasoline is a job. And it's power, light, and the way back home.

vpx_info.**battle_the_power**: Shooting *HITCH-HIKER TUNNEL* multiple times lights *BATTLE THE POWER*.
vpx_info.**buy_extra_ball**: At the end of a game you may buy 1 extra ball for 1 credit. All features and score remain as they were at the end of game!
vpx_info.**extra_ball**: Shoot the ball multiple times around The *LEFT RAMP* to light extra ball.
vpx_info.**multi-ball**: Spell *GUM-BALL* by shooting the *LEFT* and *RIGHT* ramps. *LOCK* balls by shooting into the *LOCK AREA* located above the *PLAYER PIANO*.
vpx_info.**object**: Explore the strange world of the Twilight Zone. *BATTLE THE POWER* using *MAGNA-FLIP*. Try to unlock *THE DOOR* by lighting all the *DOOR PANELS*. Stop *TIME* by using *THE CLOCK*.
vpx_info.**power_ball**: Get the *POWER BALL* out of the *GUMBALL MACHINE* by shooting up the right side of the game when the *GUMBALL ARROW* is flashing. When the *WHITE POWERBALL* is on the playfield *RETURN IT* to the *GUMBALL MACHINE* to begin *POWER BALL MANIA*. In *POWER BALL MANIA* shoot at the right ramp to *BATTLE THE POWER*!
vpx_info.**the_door**: Shooting the *LEFT RAMP* lights the *PLAYER PIANO*. Shooting the *RIGHT RAMP* lights *THE SLOT MACHINE*. The *PLAYER PIANO* awards the currently *FLASHING DOOR PANEL*. The *SLOT MACHINE* awards a *RANDOM DOOR PANEL*.
